message:
refactor(server): clean up ATC engine, remove dead fields, fix budget estimate

ATC engine changes:
- Remove unused decision_alpha from AtcLivenessPolicyArtifact
- Remove unused estimated_gain and estimated_cost_micros from
  AtcProbeCandidate, keeping only gain_per_micro used for ranking
- Fix estimated_non_probe_micros to include summary_avg_micros in the
  total, preventing systematic budget underestimation
- Reformat mul_add chains, closure arguments, and long method signatures
  for rustfmt compliance
- Match on *action (copy) instead of &action reference in tick dispatch

Add three new tests:
- detect_deadlocks cache hit/miss tracking across generation bumps
- budgeted_probe_schedule budget cap and exclusion enforcement
- atc_tick_report telemetry field exposure (budget, policy, kernel)

TUI: minor formatting adjustments in system_health policy display and
tui_web_dashboard base64 assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
